baseline_results.reference:
I've got that you no longer want to proceed with the purchase with the order number {{Order Number}}. I apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused you. To cancel the purchase, please follow these steps:

1. Sign into Your Account: Log in to your {{Online Company Portal Info}} using your credentials.
2. Access Your Orders: Once logged in, navigate to either the '{{Online Order Interaction}}' or '{{Online Order Interaction}}' section.
3. Locate the Purchase: Look for the order with the order number {{Order Number}} and click on it to view the details.
4. Cancel the Purchase: Within the purchase details page, you should find an option to '{{Online Order Interaction}}'. Please select this option.
5. Confirm the Cancellation: The system may ask for confirmation before canceling the purchase. Please review the information and confirm the cancellation if prompted.

If you encounter any difficulties during the cancellation process or if you have any further questions, our dedicated support team is available to assist you. You can reach us during {{Customer Support Hours}} at {{Customer Support Phone Number}} or by using the Live Chat feature on our {{Website URL}}. We apologize again for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
